class.name: ResourceExporter
class.brief_description: Base class for resource export plugins.

method.name: export_file
method.description: Exports the resource at an absolute path at [param src_path] to the filesystem path [param out_path]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success, or an error code if the export fails.

method.name: export_resource
method.description: Exports the resource described by [param import_infos] into [param output_dir], recovering the original source file. Returns an [ExportReport] summarizing the outcome.

method.name: get_default_export_extension
method.description: Returns the preferred output extension for the resource at [param res_path].

method.name: get_export_extensions
method.description: Returns the file extensions this exporter can produce for the resource at [param res_path] (e.g. [code]["png", "webp"][/code] for a texture exporter).

method.name: get_name
method.description: Returns the human-readable name of this exporter, used for logging and identification.

method.name: handles_import
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this exporter can handle resources produced by the named [param importer] (e.g. [code]"texture"[/code]) of the given [param resource_type] (e.g. [code]"Texture2D"[/code]).

method.name: supports_nonpack_export
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this exporter can export resources that are not part of a loaded PCK (i.e. standalone resource files on disk).
